test-method.name: testIxigoFlow
test-method.description: Search flights on Ixigo and complete till payment with credit card

param.value: {lastName=Automation, firstName=Test User One, cvv=123, ToCity=Kolkata, FromCity=New Delhi, exp=12/30, Mobile=9340299487, cardNumber=4111111111111111, DepartDate=2026-06-15}

exception.message:
element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (88, 208). Other element would receive the click:
...

test-method.name: testIxigoFlow
test-method.description: Search flights on Ixigo and complete till payment with credit card
